name: CMM Document Reference Graph and Page-Resumable Pass 2
description: Upgrade the CMM extraction pipeline to resolve long-range document references deterministically and make Pass 2 page-resumable for large, dense manuals.

userStories.title: Add Hybrid Reference Persistence
userStories.description: As the extraction system, I want raw page reference data stored flexibly and resolved section links stored structurally so that cross-page context can be maintained without introducing an over-engineered graph platform.
acceptanceCriteria: Define a hybrid persistence design that keeps raw per-page reference extraction in JSON metadata and stores resolved section-context links in structured database fields or tables
The structured layer records which pages are attached to which section and why

The structured layer supports these link reasons at minimum: diagram_page, explicit_figure_reference, explicit_page_reference, check_reference_context, repair_reference_context, special_assembly_reference
The schema design is limited to the minimum needed to drive deterministic extraction and resumption
Existing extracted templates remain readable after the schema change
`npm run typecheck` passes
`npm run lint` passes
Manual verification is documented on at least one real 73+ page CMM with known long-range references
Confirm extraction can complete without manual lease clearing or full-section reprocessing after interruption

userStories.title: Extract Explicit References During Pass 1
userStories.description: As the extraction system, I want each classified page to emit explicit document references so that section context is determined by identifiers instead of proximity alone.
acceptanceCriteria: Pass 1 extracts explicit references from relevant pages, including figure references, page references, check references, repair references, and special assembly figure references
Raw extracted references are persisted per page in template-level metadata
Diagram pages still create section anchors by figure number as they do today
inspection_text pages are no longer linked only by nearest-page distance when explicit references are available
The system preserves the current page classification outputs and does not reduce Pass 1 accuracy for existing short-range cases
`npm run typecheck` passes
`npm run lint` passes
Manual verification is documented on at least one real 73+ page CMM with known long-range references
Confirm extraction can complete without manual lease clearing or full-section reprocessing after interruption

userStories.title: Resolve Reference Graph Into Section Context
userStories.description: As the extraction system, I want explicit page references resolved into deterministic section context so that each section includes all relevant supporting pages before deep extraction begins.
acceptanceCriteria: The resolver links text, index, and reference pages to sections by explicit figure or page reference before using proximity fallback
Proximity fallback is only used when no explicit resolvable reference exists
Resolution decisions record confidence and link reason
A section can include context pages that are far from the diagram pages in the source PDF
Ambiguous references are retained in raw metadata and marked unresolved rather than silently attached to the wrong section
Resolved context pages are reflected in the section's effective extraction page set
`npm run typecheck` passes
`npm run lint` passes
Manual verification is documented on at least one real 73+ page CMM with known long-range references
Confirm extraction can complete without manual lease clearing or full-section reprocessing after interruption

userStories.title: Make Pass 2 Page-Resumable
userStories.description: As the extraction system, I want Pass 2 to process one page at a time with persisted progress so that dense sections cannot fail as one oversized invocation.
acceptanceCriteria: Pass 2 processes one section page per invocation, not an entire section
Each processed page persists raw consensus output before the next page begins
A partially completed section resumes from the next unprocessed page without redoing completed pages
Section finalization runs as a separate step that merges per-page outputs, deduplicates items, validates results, and writes final items
Pass 2 remains sequential at the section level and continues using the current dual-model consensus approach per page
If one page fails, the failure is isolated to that page or section state and does not require rerunning the entire template
`npm run typecheck` passes
`npm run lint` passes
Manual verification is documented on at least one real 73+ page CMM with known long-range references
Confirm extraction can complete without manual lease clearing or full-section reprocessing after interruption

userStories.title: Update Extraction Orchestration and Progress APIs
userStories.description: As the system and API consumer, I want extraction progress to reflect page-level Pass 2 work and resolved context so that background processing remains observable and debuggable.
acceptanceCriteria: The extraction runner can identify the next unprocessed page for a section deterministically
Progress APIs expose enough information to distinguish Pass 1 indexing, Pass 2 page extraction, and section finalization
Structured link data is available to internal debugging endpoints or logs without requiring reviewer UI changes
Cron-based polling and lease handling continue to work with the page-resumable Pass 2 model
Stale in-progress page work can be safely retried without corrupting resolved context or duplicating final items
`npm run typecheck` passes
`npm run lint` passes
Manual verification is documented on at least one real 73+ page CMM with known long-range references
Confirm extraction can complete without manual lease clearing or full-section reprocessing after interruption

userStories.title: Validate Against Real Long CMMs
userStories.description: As the product team, we want a repeatable validation pass on a real complex CMM so that we can confirm the new reference resolution improves extraction quality instead of only changing architecture.
acceptanceCriteria: Run the pipeline on at least one real 73+ page CMM with known long-range references
Verify at least one case where a text, index, or reference page is correctly attached to a distant diagram section
Verify Pass 2 resumes from persisted per-page progress if interrupted mid-section
Compare extraction output before and after the change for at least one cross-reference-heavy figure
Document observed wins, misses, and unresolved ambiguity cases in a short task note
`npm run typecheck` passes
`npm run lint` passes
Manual verification is documented on at least one real 73+ page CMM with known long-range references
Confirm extraction can complete without manual lease clearing or full-section reprocessing after interruption
userStories.notes: Code complete — requires running pipeline on real 73+ page CMM to validate
